title: leucheria leontopodioides
intro: Leucheria leontopodioides, also known as Mountain Matricaria, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Leucheria leontopodioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
